notes: v0.16.43 — BOSS RUSH list+detail 1:1 match with mockup B. Boss list rows now clip_contents so the procedural CIRCLE/PRISM/HIVE/SNAKE glyphs and active-row outer-glow can't bleed outside the 280px row frame. Boss names get an 8-direction accent glow halo (CIRCLE / PRISM / HIVE / SNAKE now read as neon instead of flat). Hero scene title-wrap stripped of stage description per feedback — only badge + big chromatic-split + glowing wordmark left. Rewards strip rewritten as 3 chips with the real baked PNG icons (pulse.png / xp.png / boss_key.png — the orange shop key art, not a hand-drawn octagon); 84px tall, icon top, label + value below, claimed combos dim chips + flip indicators green. Module-drop panel rewritten as a single 36-px banner with rarity name pills (COMMON / UNCOMMON / RARE / EPIC / LEGENDARY) coloured from Game.MODULE_RARITY_COLORS so the colours match how rarities render in MODULES / inventory. Pills update live with the difficulty pick. Windows only.
